textByHashes.c073a4d58d798cc35bfe4aa1c4b36c3af298f201: Do not attack me, puny mortal player name!
textByHashes.257fd09c3afca242d68b05b0296a9e673ccc8d3e: Do not attack me, puny mortal fremennik name!
textByHashes.d9a5694b15c6d4db9387a2069e570fdc173c721e: I did not give you permission to touch that, mortal!
textByHashes.967f2fe29b6b47224caf93a48c5fa56b3bbd9085: Who dares to disturb my slumber?
textByHashes.32fd072b0dea5e9841281e00ef2e43236a03202d: Have you come, then, to pay your respects?
textByHashes.4e394bc64932ef6fb85efa41bd5b52a48362b013: Go now, mortal, but I'll be watching you!
textByHashes.0770e3b84268fcfacbbb2ef83bd5e01202f316fb: I am the guardian of the mountain, the god of the northern lands. I move the earth and control the skies. I am the Kendal!
textByHashes.e3757d62545284163218309c087179a0d599d333: I am not here to answer questions of such trivial nature! Go now before doom befalls you, mortal!
textByHashes.9b94a410e257b5f2b33653fabc4a9aac24989935: I would not say such things if I were you, mortal!
textByHashes.acfc763b3369dc451f0b2849bbae4e29859174a9: How did you figure that out? How did you know?
textByHashes.84cd23149de4bb8fb3e7ca65c662718af13f98ea: Ah, the people that live in the mountains here, they are a superstitious lot. They fear few things, but magic and gods they're scared to death of.
textByHashes.c8bdf0b1181026ea07f065354b3aea79a32946a1: So I took on the guise of one of their legends. It's a good way of being left alone.
textByHashes.054da83d53ddaecb95dbabf3b08578146077f9c4: Ah, you're referring to the skeletons you see here? Yes, I did. Most of the time, at least. When there was no troll to be ambushed, and I had to eat...
textByHashes.d88dc40e487aeb1731c624bdec464864f65c1a41: Recently? Oh no, the entrance you came through has been blocked off for a good many years now. I've only seen trolls and the occasional stray dwarf since then, until you came along.
textByHashes.621790086cef5c24447fdc2a499a6c874217b710: But yes, more than ten years ago, I did kill someone like that.
textByHashes.3f05502b32926e6d440de6448e0fd19f83e00c86: She is just over there, in the centre, with the dress. I did not eat her after I killed her, she was too beautiful for that.
textByHashes.8e6c2661da4ac1fb39b86ac1dc5e11b3efa97f68: I felt sorry for killing her, but by then it was already too late.
textByHashes.235738630d3b1f904e4a6b9dce17d7f93dd8a284: You demand nothing! You may have uncovered my disguise, but my claws can still tear you apart at will!
textByHashes.f148397925a138b00bd96a2580fce7517a8e2c65: I will not allow you to leave!
textByHashes.2f1e313cb439f23a578c2ba216cdf72c967fbc43: I cannot do that. If they knew I wasn't a god, and if her father knew I killed his daughter, the whole tribe would come in here at once and I'd be finished.
textByHashes.c940ba5c6278d8393c83ccaef3bf6e01a63cad47: I'm afraid I can't allow you to leave either. You cannot tell anyone about me.
textByHashes.0d46a031fc345556bb93a04f33ab2b6ba8bcce62: And how is that very much different from you, walking around in silly suits of armour, killing everything that moves?
textByHashes.a92a0177fdf913cd9bb61bb76cae25dbf4ee0502: You are brave, to come into my cave and say a thing like that!
